The following events took place in '''3000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Varner Hilts]] became the [[Grand Lord]] of the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kesh/Legends|Kesh]].<ref name="Secrets">''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Secrets]]''</ref>
*The [[wedding of Varner Hilts and Iliana Merko]] on Kesh.<ref name="Secrets" />
*The [[Hilts Restoration]] began on Kesh.<ref name="Secrets" />
*[[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] was colonized by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] colonists.
*[[Derilyn]] was settled by colonists from [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]].
*[[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] was colonized by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers.
*[[Farrfin]] joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*[[Nilgaard Bioprocessing]] began a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation on the planet [[Reaper's World/Legends|Reaper's World]]. {{Circa}}
*The [[Paecian Empire]] annexed [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="TEA" />
*The [[Hapan Royal Guard]] first appeared to protect the [[Hapan]] [[Queen Mother]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="Galaxy at War">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>
*[[War of the Gungan tribes]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] were unified under [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]].<ref name="Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>
*Building of [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]].<ref name="Galactic Battlegrounds" />
*The original manuscript of the ''[[Sayings]]'', a series of scrolls containing a collection of didactic and gnomic precepts of [[Uueg Tching]], the 54th [[Emperor/Legends|emperor]] of the [[Kitel Phard Dynasty]], is stored in the [[Rare Books Department]] of the [[Atrisian Imperial Historical Library]] on [[Atrisia/Legends|Kitel Phard]], where it is kept at least until approximately [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="Corellia Antilles">{{JournalCite|14|From the Files of Corellia Antilles}}</ref>
*New technology surfaced in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that was superior to that of [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] from the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] such as [[Sith dreadnaught|Sith personnel carrier]]s, [[Sith escort gunship]]s and [[Sith starfighter]]s.<ref name="SithCompendium">{{GamerCite|5|The Sith Compendium}}</ref>
